summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 21 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 84 — we need to reverse this today. 194 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **79 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 50 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$79,779 in payments going out this week** across 41 tasks — make sure funds are available. $35,637 expected in from 4 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Ginger Brown and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.
